title: Screenshot Manager
description: Adds a menu for showing screenshots you've taken.
body:
**Note that the beta versions can crash Minecraft.**  
**See the Bugs / Issues / Crashes section for more info on how to send feedback.**

# Screenshot Manager
<u>Adds a menu for showing screenshots you've taken.</u>

## Features
Full screen menu, with a toolbar at the bottom, to close it there's a close button at top right.  
Adds a button in the title screen to access the screenshots menu.  

## Source code
It's on GitHub: [Ultreon/screenshot-manager (github.com)](https://github.com/Ultreon/screenshot-manager)  

## Links
Qboi123 - ([Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6zGmXLKHUY5rAObdGLvvMA), [GitHub](https://github.com/Qboi123))  
Ultreon Team - ([Youtube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC35VI5RDb1hdsXWtqJIu3mw), [GitHub](https://github.com/Ultreon), [Website](https://ultreon.github.io/web/))  

## Bugs / Issues / Crashes
In Alpha / Beta releases stuff might change or break, it's recommended to use them for testing purposes only.  
If there's a problem with the mod: don't post the crash report in the comments, but post it on the issue tracker here: Screenshot Manager Issues at [GitHub](https://github.com/Ultreon/screenshot-manager/issues).  
If there's no crash report but it still crashes, post the debug.log file in your .minecraft/logs folder to the issue tracker.  
If there's no crash report and there's no crash in the debug.log, then there's probably a problem with the Java installation or a windows driver (what I have sometimes).  

## Feature requests
If you want to request a feature you can do it on [GitHub](https://github.com/Ultreon/screenshot-manager/issues).
